---
title: LMU Open Science Summer School 2026
date: 2026-02-23
categories:
  - Summer School
event:
  start_date: '2026-09-07'
  end_date: '2026-09-11'
  description: |
    Save the date! Our annual Summer School will take place from September 7-11, 2026. Registration will be opened soon.
  time: '9:00-17:00'
  location:
    name: Hybrid (Philologicum Library, Ludwigstraße 25, Munich and via Zoom)
    address: 
    map_url: 
  format:
    type: Hybrid
    detail: ''
  language:
    primary: English
    primary-code: en
    detail: en
links:
  registration: 
  materials: 
  workshop_website:
event_description: |

  The LMU Open Science Center is hosting its **5th hybrid Open Science Summer School**, offering participants the option to join **in person in Munich** or **online via Zoom**.

  The summer school is designed to equip early career researchers and research support staff with practical Open Science skills through two complementary tracks.

  ### Track 1: Open Science knowledge and skills  
  **07–11 September 2026**

  This track introduces participants to core Open Science practices aimed at improving the transparency, reproducibility, and credibility of research. It combines public lectures with hands-on workshops.

  Participants will learn how to:
  
  - Plan research designs and statistical analyses in advance (e.g. preregistration, data simulation)  
  - Build computationally reproducible workflows using version-controlled scripts  
  - Prepare and share data and code following FAIR principles and best practices  

  ### Track 2: Open Science instructor training  
  **14–15 September 2026**

  This track focuses on developing pedagogical and leadership skills for those interested in teaching and promoting Open Science. No prior teaching experience is required.

  Participants will:

  - Learn how to design and deliver Open Science workshops
  - Apply effective teaching and engagement strategies  
  - Develop skills to advocate for Open Science within their communities  
  - Design and present their own workshop for future delivery  

  Participants are encouraged to implement their workshops after the program, with support from the LMU Open Science Center.

  ### Funding & Partners

  The summer school is organized by LMU Open Science Center coordinators  
  [Dr. Sarah von Grebmer zu Wolfsthurn](/people/people/sarah-von-grebmer-zu-wolfsthurn.qmd) and  
  [Dr. Malika Ihle](/people/people/malika-ihle.qmd).

  The program is funded by the LMU Central Study Fund and the Volkswagen Foundation Pioneer Project grant, with in-kind support from the University Library of LMU Munich. Materials were developed in collaboration with [PROFiL](https://www.lmu.de/profil/de/) and [FORRT](https://forrt.org/). 

  ![](images/2026-09-07-lmu-open-science-summer-school-funders-logo.jpg){width=60%}
  
  For more information and full program, visit: <http://lmu-osc.github.io/Open-Science-Summer-School-2026/>
instructors:
  - name: 
    url: ''

helpers:
  - name: 
contact:
  name: LMU Open Science Center
  email: osc@lmu.de
organizers: 
  - name: Dr. Sarah von Grebmer zu Wolfsthurn
presenters:
  - name: ''
    url: ''
host:
  - name: LMU Open Science Center
    url: https://lmu-osc.github.io/
  - name: LMU University Library (UB)
  - name: Professionell in der Lehre (PROFil)
    url: https://www.lmu.de/profil/de/
  - name: Framework for Open and Reproducible Research Training (FORRT)
    url: https://forrt.org/ 

template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---
